calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2020 Off Calendar

Motion To Enter Default Judgement In Favor Of Plaintiff Michael V. Farrar Against Chadwich P. Houser
Off Calendar Jan-16-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Chadwick P. Houser, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR #12353. Telephone: 415-551-0610. Email: mviscio@sftc.org.

Barry Fischer, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Michael V. Farrar, an individual, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Chadwick P. Houser, an individual.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Fraud & Deceit, and Negligent Misrepresentation was filed on April 9, 2017.
Order permitting plaintiff to serve Summons & Complaint via publication was filed on November 26, 2018.
Proof of Publication of Summons & Complaint was filed with the Clerk's Office on May 8, 2019.
Default as to defendant Chadwick P. Houser, an individual, was entered on May 28, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 28, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Michael V. Farrar, an individual, and against the defaulted defendant Chadwick P. Houser, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $300,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $121,590.00.
Attorney Fees - $14,230.00.
Costs - $3,369.00.

Total - $439,189.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
